title: stipa pennata var. araxensis
intro: Stipa pennata var. araxensis, also known as Armenian feather grass, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Armenia and Turkey. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Armenian feather grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, fever, and digestive problems.
